subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! These are two servants, drawn to Thy luminous countenance and Thy Most Glorious Beauty, who are submissive before Thy loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذان عبدان منجذبان الی طلعتک النوراء و جمالک الابهی خاضعان لاحبتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
